abort.device_added: New Jebao device was added to your existing configuration
abort.devices_added: New Jebao devices were added to your existing configuration
abort.devices_already_configured: All discovered devices are already configured.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the device. Please check IP and try again.
error.already_configured: Device is already configured in your system. Please try a different IP.
error.user_not_exist: No account exists with this email address in the selected region.
error.connection_error: Could not reach the Gizwits cloud service. Check your internet connection.
error.unknown_error: The Gizwits cloud service returned an unexpected error.
error.invalid_json: The Gizwits cloud service returned an invalid response.
error.invalid_response: The Gizwits cloud service response did not include a login token.
error.auth: Login failed. Check your email address and password.
error.no_devices: No devices are bound to this Gizwits account.

manual.description: No devices were found automatically. Enter the IP address of a Jebao device. Additional devices can then be added from the integration page in HA.
manual.title: Manual Configuration

data_description.ip: The device's IP address on your network, e.g. 192.168.1.50. Consider giving the device a DHCP reservation in your router.
data_description.name: Optional friendly name for this device in Home Assistant.

user.title: Jebao Device Setup
user.description: Choose how Home Assistant should communicate with your Jebao devices. Local control (recommended) talks to the pumps directly on your network with instant push updates. Cloud control polls the Gizwits cloud service and works when the pumps are not reachable over the LAN.

cloud.title: Gizwits Cloud Login
cloud.description: Sign in with the account you use in the Jebao Aqua app. Your devices will be imported from the cloud and polled every 30 seconds.

data_description.region: The Gizwits region your Jebao account was created in. Most users in Europe/Africa should pick Europe; the Americas and Asia-Pacific mostly use the Americas region.
data_description.email: The email address you use to sign in to the Jebao Aqua app.
data_description.password: Your Jebao Aqua app password. It is stored so the integration can refresh its access token automatically.

init.title: Jebao Aqua Options
init.description: This integration currently manages {device_count} device(s). You can switch between local and cloud control, or rediscover devices to handle IP address changes (local mode only).

data_description.mode: Local control talks to the devices directly on your LAN with instant updates (recommended). Cloud control polls the Gizwits cloud service instead.
data_description.rediscover: Scan the network again to find new devices and update stored IP addresses (local mode only).

cloud.title: Gizwits Cloud Login
cloud.description: Switching to cloud control requires your Gizwits account credentials (the account used in the Jebao Aqua app).

data_description.region: The Gizwits region your Jebao account was created in. Most users in Europe/Africa should pick Europe; the Americas and Asia-Pacific mostly use the Americas region.
data_description.email: The email address you use to sign in to the Jebao Aqua app.
data_description.password: Your Jebao Aqua app password. It is stored so the integration can refresh its access token automatically.

error.user_not_exist: No account exists with this email address in the selected region.
error.connection_error: Could not reach the Gizwits cloud service. Check your internet connection.
error.unknown_error: The Gizwits cloud service returned an unexpected error.
error.invalid_json: The Gizwits cloud service returned an invalid response.
error.invalid_response: The Gizwits cloud service response did not include a login token.
error.auth: Login failed. Check your email address and password.
error.no_devices: No devices are bound to this Gizwits account.
